title: Asuka and Bardiel
wikitext:
[]: Asuka and Bardiel             Quote Post by Strayn » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:30 am I'm aware there are many different threads that contain posts about Asuka's possibility of becoming an angel, but I don't think I've come across a thread solely for possibility discussion. What if her left eye contained what was left of Bardiel? possibly the final angel? becomes pilot of 08 "awakening" from her coma? maybe the angel is triggered by her depression? why else would she need to be the one in unit 03 if it didn't lead to a greater purpose? I thought up a scene where Shinji and Asuka are fighting and she was piloting 08 and had a plug suit similar to it, and it was in space... but that's just my imagination.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:55 am It's a possibility that I'm pretty afraid of. Despite the fact that she barely had a perceptible onscreen relationship with Shinji to make such a thing dramatically viable, despite the fact that we already have a human Angel (Kaworu. No, he hasn't been specifically identified as one yet, but he breathes freely on the moon ) and despite the fact that the "Shinji is forced to fight Asuka" plot has already been done, I wouldn't put it past Khara to do it anyway. Her whole arc so far has consisted largely of adding insult to injury. As far as leading to a "greater purpose" is concerned, it'd be much more of a greater purpose to have her return force Shinji to face the reality of what he's done and take responsibility for his actions, rather than killing her off for real to further cull his fantasy harem. There's also the fact that Shinji and Rei have, as of the end of 2.0, also made similarly complete contact with an Angel, possibly even moreso. It'd be a pretty lame cop-out for two of them to be okay while the other is inexplicably contaminated/infected.

[]:             Quote Post by Strayn » Fri Feb 18, 2011 10:31 am True, but Bardiel was a contamination type, Zeruel wasn't. Also, Shinji used almost godlike powers to get Rei out of Zeruel, I don't think Asuka had those in time of need lol. Do you think they would incorporate the mind-rape scene into 3.0 or Final and have it as a catalyst to her possible angelmiation? Edit: I'm new to the forums, so if my posts don't make sense or are plain stupid, forgive me. ^^

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Fri Feb 18, 2011 10:54 am @esselfortium: What you are describing regarding Asuka, Rei and Shinji "merging" with an Angel is a theme that is already present in NGE. After all: - Shinji is sucked into a Dirac Sea during the Leliel fight, and communicates with the Angel (who takes the shape of his younger self). - Unit-03 was hijacked by Bardiel while Toji was inside the entry plug. Unfortunately, we never learn what he experienced in there, although he does seem to recover from the ordeal mentally. Still, the battle between the Angel and Unit-01 left him maimed. - Shinji battles Zeruel and loses his physical substance inside the entry plug as Yui tears the Angel to pieces. While "disembodied", Shinji experiences a mind trip that is much like Instrumentality. It takes weeks before he is recovered (apparently through his own volition). - Asuka is "mind-raped" by Arael, with it forcing her to relive the most traumatic event of her life through its prompting, which leaves her in a persistent state of depression and catatonia. - Rei (II) is physically and mentally contaminated by Armisael, which appears to her as a (bleeding?) image of herself and questions her about her feelings. The progressing contamination of both herself and Unit-00 (which is arguably a part of her) prompts Rei to selfdestruct Unit-00, effectively martyring herself. - Kaworu is an Angel in a human body. - Rei (III) has Lilith's soul and abandons her human existence to become Lilith once again. I've listed these in chronological order. This shows that the line between human (pilot) and Angel grows ever thinner, until there is hardly any distinction at all. (As an added bonus, this sliding scale is good for dramatic effect.) The point of this post? Rebuild also shows that the distinction between humans (pilots) and Angels is also becoming thin. Just like in NGE, it started with the 9th Angel ("Bardiel") hijacking Unit-03. The 10th Angel ("Zeruel") fulfills the roles of both Armisael and [s]Leliel[/s] Zeruel in having Rei and Shinji become intimate with an Angel. I wouldn't be at all surprised if the first part of Rebuild 3.0/Q would feature a sequence involving Shinji and Rei similar to the aftermath of the [s]Leliel[/s] Zeruel battle in NGE, i.e. their bodies have dissolved into LCL, and they need a reason to become physical beings again. EDITED TO CHANGE MISREMEMBERED ELEMENTS. THIS POST IS NOW CORRECT.

[]:             Quote Post by Strayn » Fri Feb 18, 2011 11:04 am ^and maybe Asuka and Bardiel are the first to break that line and become one? Edit: I almost forgot Zeruel and Rei become one, scratch that post.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 18, 2011 4:00 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: I wouldn't be at all surprised if the first part of Rebuild 3.0/Q would feature a sequence involving Shinji and Rei similar to the aftermath of the Leliel battle in NGE, i.e. their bodies have dissolved into LCL, and they need a reason to become physical beings again.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Fri Feb 18, 2011 4:07 pm Reichu wrote: Aftermath of the Zeruel battle, surely?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 18, 2011 4:13 pm No, no, I meant what I said. :p (Reichu has this show laser-burned onto the inside of her brain.) 16: Yui bursts out of Leliel and Shinji is perfectly solid. Misato drapes herself over him and bawls her eyes out. 19-20: Yui goes apeshit but goes back to her cage like a good girl so she can continue scheming and Nerv can figure out what to do with the Shinji Juice in the plug. If you're ever in doubt about what happens when, we have that Wiki thing lying around.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Fri Feb 18, 2011 4:41 pm Reichu wrote: If you're ever in doubt about what happens when, we have that Wiki thing lying around.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 18, 2011 4:47 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: One doesn't tend to look up things one thinks one remembers correctly.

What if her left eye contained what was left of Bardiel? possibly the final angel? becomes pilot of 08 "awakening" from her coma? maybe the angel
